deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash deal closed Apr 27 at $152K. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Post-close gifts and thank-you notes still pending.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket + rug + trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Personal note to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Confirmed fully closed and funded. Post-close items still pending.
Transaction officially closed and funded at $152K.
Cleared and funded.
Follow-up email sent to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.

Confirmed Chelsey Bongiovi name and contact. Chicago Title underwriting: release required or 45-day wait.
Called Reliable Title, spoke with Chelsey Bongiovi. Lien prepared at Deeds.com.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo re: Fernando Castillo lien. Cooperative.
Joyce sent lien bypass form. Chris managing on behalf of estate.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU) dead, no earnest money. Steve finished clearing. New prospect reached out May 9 interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: lead with net after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect re: subdivision/alternate use showing. Get drone footage for marketing upgrade.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her information on land-only cash deal approach.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next priority.
Current offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve still clearing. Strategy: lead with net after close.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10 — stalled.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodeling (Matt Toney, $54,877) selected over T&T (Kendall, $61,980). Dumpsters dropped Saturday May 9. Chris on site today May 11 with Matt Toney and project manager.
deals.next: On-site visit today with Matt Toney. Confirm scope and timeline. Get police report from city office.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and project manager on site. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney / San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney in his office. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler on a phone call. Goal: work starts by Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still being explored.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site for estimate tomorrow.
Kelly asked Chris to file police report and meet officer at property. Lawyer Deborah Geiger confirmed son caused damage.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater VA loan listing. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Vacant 6 months. Sellers double-carrying. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price cut with cash to close. Showing May 5. Grass still unresolved.
deals.next: Get showing feedback from May 5 showing. Resolve lawn care. Broker call on short sale protocol first, then present three paths to Matt and Chandler.

logs.m: Chris checking on property while in Devine. Still need showing feedback from May 5. Grass unresolved.
Dropping sign and lockbox when in Devine. Keep marketing.
Buyer showing at 2pm by outside agent. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens: Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. A.M. Lawn Care also quoting today.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off per CMA ($350K-$400K). Showing Monday May 4 at 2pm. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater $93K-$143K. Three paths identified. 717 Jack Nicklaus just listed $519K at 5 DOM — direct competitor.
Gilberto buyers wishy-washy, seller finance likely dead. Need honest price adjustment conversation.
Gilberto connected through Josh LT — potential seller finance buyer waiting on insurance claim funding.
Showing at property — potential owner finance buyer.

Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Paid off debt. 30-day wait for credit pull. Pre-approval expected Feb 2026.
